news.headline: CVS and Aetna Better Health of Illinois donate $100,000 grant to Chicago's Dovetail Project for fatherhood support.
news.summary: In Chicago on January 9, 2025, The Dovetail Project, a local nonprofit advocating for fatherhood, shared their gratitude for receiving a substantial $100,000 grant from Aetna Better Health of Illinois, a subsidiary of CVS Health. The funds will be utilized by Dovetail to bolster their efforts in supporting...

news.headline: Flagler Technologies acquires Allied Help Desk Services, solidifying its position as industry leader. Fla., Jan. 9, 2025.
news.summary: Flagler Technologies, a prominent technology company based in Boca Raton, Florida, has established itself as a frontrunner in the industry dedicated to fostering innovation. With a strong focus on enhancing the operational efficiency of businesses, Flagler Technologies continues to lead the way in driving progress. The company's recent endeavors indicate their commitment to staying at the forefront of technological advancements...

news.headline: SEOULTECH introduces graphene-based laser lift-off method for ultrathin displays, ensuring flawless wearable tech.
news.summary: In SEOUL, South Korea, on January 9, 2025, researchers from SEOULTECH introduced an innovative method utilizing graphene to assist in the laser lift-off process, ensuring that ultrathin displays remain undamaged and ideal for wearable technology. This breakthrough technique aims to maintain the flawless quality of the displays, enhancing their suitability for various applications.

news.headline: TIFIN AMP and Janus Henderson partner for AI-driven distribution solutions; Janus Henderson manages $382 billion in assets.
news.summary: In Boulder, Colorado on January 9, 2025, it was revealed that TIFIN AMP Inc. ("TIFIN AMP") has formed a significant partnership with Janus Henderson Investors ("Janus Henderson"), a prominent global active asset manager. This collaboration involves the integration of TIFIN AMP's AI-powered distribution intelligence platform with Janus Henderson's operations. Janus Henderson, which currently manages around $382 billion in assets, will benefit from the innovative capabilities provided by TIFIN AMP. The strategic alliance marks a significant development for both companies in the financial sector.

news.headline: EV Group invests in Cornelius Group plc with a minority equity stake, strengthening their partnership.
news.summary: In RHO, Italy, EV Group, a prominent distributor and manufacturer of specialty chemicals and food ingredients, has finalized agreements with Cornelius Group, an international manufacturer and distributor of specialty additives and ingredients. The deal involves EV acquiring a minority stake in Cornelius, with plans to increase its ownership in the company. The transaction marks a significant milestone for both companies operating in the life sciences and performance chemicals markets.

news.headline: New Floor & Decor store opened in Venice, FL, providing jobs and shopping experience to locals.
news.summary: In recent reports, it has been disclosed that the annual budget for the upcoming fiscal year has been proposed at $3.5 billion, a significant increase from the previous year. Additionally, it has been revealed that the unemployment rate has risen to 7.2%, marking a 2% increase from the previous quarter. The stock market has also been experiencing fluctuations, with the main index dropping by 500 points in the last week. Furthermore, experts predict that the GDP growth rate for the next quarter is expected to remain stagnant at 2.5%. These developments highlight the current economic challenges faced by the nation.

news.headline: New consulting company, Blupact Strategy Group, launched to build brand trust and growth by uniting employees and consumers. Founded by women, it aims to transform brands through insights and advocacy.
news.summary: Blupact Strategy Group is a company founded by a female entrepreneur that focuses on transforming brands through utilizing insights to establish trust and create long-term advocacy among employees and customers. This company, based in New York, commenced operations on January 9, 2025. Blupact Strategy Group offers consulting services aimed at enhancing brand presence and fostering stronger connections with their target audience. To learn more about their services, visit their website at blupact.com.

news.headline: Fluid Air, a division of Spraying Systems Co., partners with SinoPep Biotech to revolutionize peptide and oligonucleotide production.
news.summary: Fluid Air, a branch of Spraying Systems Co., has collaborated with SinoPep Biotech to revolutionize the manufacturing process of peptides and oligonucleotides. This partnership was unveiled in Naperville, Illinois, on January 9, 2025. Fluid Air, a segment of Spraying Systems Co., expressed enthusiasm about this strategic alliance.

news.headline: 65% of workers feel empowered to decline extra work, 42% relieved when they do. Burnout persists, especially among younger workers and women.
news.summary: A recent survey found that 42% of workers experience relief when turning down additional tasks. However, burnout and mental health challenges remain prevalent, particularly among younger employees and women. The study, conducted in Guaynabo, Puerto Rico, disclosed these findings on January 9, 2025, by Resume Now®, a prominent provider of career and resume services.

news.headline: dotCMS reflects on the successes of 2024 in their Year-in-Review, highlighting innovation and growth.CEO Zain Ishaq.
news.summary: Discover the key events of dotCMS' impressive journey in 2024 through our detailed Year-in-Review. Delve into the significant milestones, achievements, and memorable instances that defined our year, exemplifying progress, expansion, and the significance of collaborations that paved the way for 2025. The review covers the happenings in Miami on January 9, 2025. Explore the growth and success achieved during this period.

news.headline: BioPharmCatalyst and BYTE51 partner to provide comprehensive data on biotech companies for smarter investing.
news.summary: Access to detailed information on both public and private biotech companies is now possible to improve investment choices. In a recent development on January 9, 2025, BioPharmCatalyst, a reliable platform for clinical and financial data concerning publicly traded biotech firms, has collaborated with BYTE51. This partnership aims to provide a comprehensive database for potential investors looking to make informed decisions. The initiative will offer valuable insights into the biotech sector, covering statistics on various companies to help investors navigate the market effectively. This move is set to assist in boosting confidence among investors and facilitate strategic investment planning.

news.headline: The Joy Factory introduces aXtion Extreme MP Case for iPad 10.9" for protection in hazardous locations.
news.summary: Introducing a new durable case designed to keep connected workers safe and efficient in challenging conditions. The Joy Factory, based in Irvine, California, declared the release of the aXtion Extreme MP Case (CWA657MP) for iPad 10.9" on January 9, 2025. This rugged tablet accessory will provide protection and ensure productivity for individuals operating in extreme environments.

news.headline: AgTechLogic & Sun Corridor partner on cellular broadband for farmers in remote areas using Agtellio Precision Spraying tech.
news.summary: AgTellio Precision Spraying Technology, developed by AgTechLogic, has been implemented on farms in conjunction with Sun Corridor's connectivity in MESA, Arizona. This collaboration aims to bring sustainable agriculture technology to various locations. The initiative was announced on January 9, 2025. AgTechLogic is a prominent sustainable agriculture company offering innovative solutions for farmers. The partnership with Sun Corridor is expected to enhance the effectiveness and accessibility of AgTellio Precision Spraying Technology, making it available across a wider geographical area.

news.headline: Transcard expands to Canada, bringing SMART Suite for payment orchestration. Partnerships with Canadian businesses, local payment rail integration.
news.summary: Transcard has revealed its entry into the Canadian market, where it will launch its SMART Suite for payment orchestration to improve digital payment solutions. This move involves collaborations with Canadian companies, integration with local payment rails, and offering multilingual support. This showcases the company's commitment to expanding its operations internationally.

news.headline: Bizagi achieved 60 G2 Badges across various categories, establishing its leadership in low-code process automation.
news.summary: Bizagi has been awarded 60 G2 Badges in categories like Low-Code Development, Business Process Management, and Digital Process Automation. The company, a top player in low-code process automation, received this accolade in G2's Winter 2025 rankings. The recognition comes as a testament to Bizagi's expertise and leadership in the industry.

news.headline: Pacifica Graduate Institute launches groundbreaking certificate program on PTSD and moral injury for returning warriors.
news.summary: A prestigious educational institution, Pacifica Graduate Institute, known for its expertise in depth psychology and applied Jungian studies, has unveiled a new certificate program. Titled "Restoration and the Returning Warrior: A Depth Psychological Approach to PTSD and Moral Injury," the program aims to address the needs of veterans suffering from these conditions. This initiative marks a significant step for the institute, showcasing its dedication to helping individuals cope with the challenges of post-traumatic stress disorder (PTSD) and moral injury.

news.headline: Roland DGA launched TrueVIS XP-640 high-speed eco-solvent printer, offering superior image quality in Irvine, Calif.
news.summary: A renowned company based in Irvine, California, Roland DGA Corporation, has unveiled its latest innovation in wide-format inkjet technology on January 9, 2025. This new offering promises exceptional image quality and increased productivity. As a leading provider of wide-format inkjet printers and printer/cutters, Roland DGA Corporation aims to deliver top-notch performance to its customers. This next-generation product is set to raise the bar in the industry, attracting attention with its cutting-edge features and capabilities.

news.headline: SIMA Financial Group launches new website to enhance user experience, focusing on accounting, benefits, payroll & retirement.
news.summary: A new website has been unveiled by SIMA Financial Group, a firm based in Virginia that focuses on providing accounting, benefits, payroll, retirement, technology, and wealth services for small and medium-sized enterprises. The updated website aims to enhance user experience and accessibility for clients. This launch signifies an effort by the firm to cater to businesses seeking financial solutions.

news.headline: MotherToBaby launches interactive pregnancy tool, FASD podcast, webinar for Birth Defects Awareness Month. 1 in X affected.
news.summary: In January, as part of Birth Defects Awareness Month, MotherToBaby collaborates with health organizations nationwide to spotlight the impact of birth defects on communities and promote prevention. On January 9, 2025, in Brentwood, Tenn., the initiative kicks off. This year, the focus remains on increasing awareness about birth defects, affecting 1 in every (insert % here) births. Through this campaign, vital efforts are being made to educate the public and prevent birth defects from occurring.

news.headline: CEO John Walsworth of CSG Government Solutions recognized as Top 25 Consulting Firm CEOs of 2024 by The Consulting Report.
news.summary: CSG Government Solutions, a prominent player in government program modernization, revealed today that John Walsworth, the company's Founder, Chairman, and Chief Executive Officer, has been recognized as one of The Top 25 CEOs of 2024 by The Consulting Report (TCR) for the second consecutive year. The prestigious list highlights executives who have excelled in their leadership roles. Walsworth's acknowledgment underscores his continued success and influence in the industry. This recognition further solidifies CSG Government Solutions' position as a key player in the sector.

news.headline: KOAMTAC's SmartSled now works with iPhone 16 models, includes upgrades like locking mechanism and 4000mAh battery.
news.summary: The KDC1000/1100/1200 SmartSled can now be used with all models of the iPhone 16. Updates to the Pistol Grip/Extended Battery Adaptor include a new locking feature, with compatibility for the latest 4000mAh Extended Battery. These enhancements were announced in Princeton, N.J., on January 9, 2025.

news.headline: MD Revolution introduces RevConnect Workflow, an integration platform for healthcare, connecting AI models, analytics tools, and applications with RevCare platform.
news.summary: A new integration platform, RevConnect Workflow, has been introduced by MD Revolution for healthcare organizations to easily connect AI models, analytics tools, and applications with the RevCare care management platform. This low-code/no-code platform is now accessible for both full-service and...

news.headline: Kustom US promotes Kevin Sheppard to President and COO to accelerate 2025 strategic growth.
news.summary: Kevin Sheppard has been appointed as the President and Chief Operating Officer of Kustom US, as part of the company's efforts to elevate its property restoration services. Sheppard, who joined in 2022, has played a key role in streamlining service operations across the country, promoting creativity, and leading the company towards its goal of setting new benchmarks for quality.

news.headline: Angel Investor Forum secures $1.2M seed fund, makes first CT investment, aims for 6-8 startups.
news.summary: A local angel investor group, Angel Investor Forum (AIF), has secured funds from investors and plans to invest in 6-8 high potential startups. The group recently announced the initial closing of AIF Seed Fund V LLC, a new seed fund totaling $1.2 million. This funding will be used to support promising early-stage companies with growth potential.

news.headline: Free webinar by Xtalks on long-acting injectables using microsphere formulations for releases from weeks to one year.
news.summary: Join us for a complimentary webinar focusing on long-acting injectables. Gain insight into selecting and maximizing long-acting microsphere formulations with release durations varying from weeks to up to a year. Participants will delve into understanding the crucial quality attributes essential for achieving customizable release profiles.

news.headline: erblue launches Next-Gen Digital Platform for EHS, combining field & lab ops with eCOC+ App & Field Portal.
news.summary: erblue has introduced its innovative Next-Generation Digital Platform, aimed at combining field and lab operations efficiently. The platform includes key features such as the eCOC+ App, Field Portal, and Integrated Lab Order Management System (LOMS). This integrated solution is designed to streamline processes and enhance collaboration between labs and field operations.

news.headline: Global organic period care products market to reach $5.2 billion by 2034, driven by demand for sustainable menstrual options.
news.summary: The global organic period care products market was valued at US$2.6 billion in 2023 and is expected to grow at a CAGR of 6.6% from 2024 to 2034, reaching US$5.2 billion by the end of that period. This growth is attributed to increasing consumer demand for sustainable and chemical-free menstrual products like organic cotton pads, menstrual cups, and period panties. These eco-friendly alternatives to traditional menstrual products are made from natural, chemical-free materials to ensure safety and comfort while addressing sustainability concerns. The market is witnessing a shift towards biodegradable and reusable options due to heightened environmental awareness. Key trends in the market include the rising popularity of reusable products such as menstrual cups and reusable period panties, as well as the expansion of e-commerce channels that are boosting sales of organic menstrual products, particularly among millennials and Gen Z.

news.headline: Air Products corrects Mantle Ridge's false claims in letter to shareholders ahead of Jan. 23 Annual Meeting.
news.summary: In Lehigh Valley, Pennsylvania on January 9, 2025, the Board of Directors of Air Products (NYSE: APD) issued a communication to shareholders regarding the upcoming 2025 Annual Meeting of Shareholders. The Annual Meeting is scheduled for January 23 at 8:30 a.m. EST. Shareholders are encouraged to participate in this important event.

news.headline: Global investment in grid digitalization to reach $150B by 2030 due to increasing energy demands and shift towards net zero.
news.summary: In recent years, there has been a noticeable lag in investments towards updating and digitizing energy grids in relation to the increasing energy demands and evolving requirements. This deficiency is particularly concerning due to the swift electrification trends and the crucial shift towards achieving net zero emissions. As a result, funds allocated to grid digitalization and modernization have fallen short, posing challenges to the energy sector's ability to efficiently meet the surging demand.

news.headline: Metagenics® named #1 doctor recommended professional supplement brand. Celebrates with savings in 2025. Trusted by healthcare community.
news.summary: Metagenics, a leading provider of science-based nutraceutical solutions, marked a significant achievement by offering New Year discounts on its products. Headquartered in Aliso Viejo, California, the company celebrated being named the top choice for professional supplements recommended by doctors. This recognition highlights Metagenics' commitment to providing high-quality products that meet the standards of healthcare professionals. Starting on January 9, 2025, customers can take advantage of special savings to access these trusted supplements.

news.headline: Vivacelle Bio to join BIO Partnering @ JPM Week 2025 in San Francisco, Jan 13-16, to showcase life-saving treatments.
news.summary: In Kansas City, Missouri on January 9, 2025, Vivacelle Bio, a company in the late stages of biopharmaceutical development specializing in life-saving therapies for shock and trauma, revealed its involvement in the BIO Partnering @ JPM Week 2025 in San Francisco from January 13-16. This event brings together industry professionals for partnerships and collaborations.

news.headline: Bluesight acquires Protenus, enhancing compliance solutions for health systems.
news.summary: In Alexandria, Va. and Baltimore, as of January 9, 2025, Bluesight, a prominent provider of inventory management, procurement, and compliance solutions for health systems and hospital pharmacies, has revealed its acquisition of Protenus. Protenus is known for its top healthcare compliance services.

news.headline: ChurnZero AI platform gains recognition for innovative features, top-rated feedback, and new AI capabilities in 2025.
news.summary: A company specializing in customer growth technology, ChurnZero, has been praised in the SaaS sector for its cutting-edge features, exceptional customer reviews, advanced AI functionalities, and ambitious goals for enhancing customer teams. As of January 9, 2025, headquartered in Washington, the platform has garnered recognition for its innovative offerings.

news.headline: Cadenza Bio, Inc. forms Women's Health SAB to develop therapies for demyelinating diseases.
news.summary: Cadenza Bio, Inc., based in Oklahoma City, made an announcement on January 9, 2025, about the establishment of its Women's Health Scientific Advisory Board. The company specializes in developing small-molecule treatments for demyelinating and inflammatory diseases. This board is dedicated to advising on research and development in women's health to enhance the effectiveness of therapies. It marks a significant step forward in the company's commitment to innovation, ensuring a focus on gender-specific health concerns.

news.headline: Runway Growth Capital and BC Partners Credit pledge $131M financing to VertexOne for growth and acquisition.
news.summary: VertexOne has secured funding to enhance its platform, increase market reach, and facilitate the acquisition of Accelerated Innovations. The funding comes from Runway Growth Capital LLC, a reputable provider of growth loans, as announced on Jan. 9, 2025, in Menlo Park, California. This investment will support VertexOne's growth and development, enabling it to capitalize on market opportunities and expand its operations.

news.headline: VEXA Beauty™ introduces first peptide-infused fragrance line, combining beauty and wellness.
news.summary: In Tampa, Florida, on January 9, 2025, VEXA Beauty™ revealed the introduction of a pioneering fragrance line that incorporates oxytocin peptides, marking a new genre at the convergence of beauty and wellness. This groundbreaking series showcases products inspired by the impact of these ingredients, setting a unique precedent in the industry.

news.headline: Now® survey finds top consumer wellness priorities for 2025: more energy, fitness support, better sleep, weight management.
news.summary: A well-known manufacturer of natural products has identified consumers' top priorities regarding supplements, which include energy boost, fitness support, improved sleep, and weight management. The survey findings reveal that these are the key areas where consumers are seeking assistance. The research was conducted in Bloomingdale, Illinois, and the results were shared on January 9, 2025. The company has also provided tips for smarter supplement shopping based on the survey data.

news.headline: AI expert Jim Harris to lead panel on predictive AI at CES 2025 in Las Vegas, discussing its economic power.
news.summary: At CES 2025, taking place in Las Vegas on January 9, a notable figure in artificial intelligence (AI) and bestselling author, Jim Harris, will be spearheading discussions on the significant influence of predictive AI. This renowned expert will be moderating a panel focusing on "Predictive AI: Transforming Customer Service" at the prestigious tech event. CES is recognized as the premier global tech exhibition, and the session led by Harris is anticipated to shed light on the innovative changes unfolding in this field.

news.headline: Energy Toolbase and Hawaii Unified Industries partner to install energy storage controls at a golf club in Kihei, Hawaii.
news.summary: In Kihei, Hawaii on January 9, 2025, Energy Toolbase (ETB) announced an expansion of its energy storage services. The company collaborated with Hawaii Unified to implement an advanced energy management system at a golf club in the area. Hawaii Unified, known for its expertise in solar modeling, joined forces with ETB to install this intelligent system. The partnership aims to enhance the energy efficiency and sustainability of the golf club's operations.

news.headline: Bilder Appliance Repair, with over 30 years of experience, expands into Colorado, focusing on the Denver-Castle Rock metro area.
news.summary: A reputable appliance repair company, Bilder Appliance Repair, with a history of over 30 years in Minnesota, is now venturing into Colorado. The company will be catering to the Denver-Castle Rock metro area. Known for its excellent service as a family-owned and operated business, Bilder Appliance Repair is set to bring its expertise to a new market.

news.headline: Starfighters Space, Inc. makes progress in space launch program from Kennedy Space Center. 75 characters.
news.summary: In Cape Canaveral, Florida on January 9, 2025, Starfighters Space, Inc., a company based at Kennedy Space Center, has made notable progress in its space launch initiative. The Company has reached a milestone with the creation and production of its latest spacecraft.

news.headline: 2nd annual Art of Whiskey event returns to New Orleans, offering exclusive whiskey tasting at M.S. Rau gallery.
news.summary: Art enthusiasts and whiskey connoisseurs are excited for the return of the Art of Whiskey event, now in its second year. The event is scheduled to be held at the prestigious M.S. Rau gallery located in the vibrant French Quarter of New Orleans on January 9, 2025. Attendees can look forward to a unique tasting experience featuring a variety of whiskeys along with delectable culinary offerings.

news.headline: BOSTONtec's Electric Height Adjustable Assembly Workbench wins 2024 Readers' Choice Award in Ergonomics & Safety.
news.summary: In Midland, Michigan on January 9, 2025, BOSTONtec revealed their achievement with the Custom Ergonomic Electric Height Adjustable Assembly Workbench, being recognized as the favored product of 2024 by industry readers. BOSTONtec is a prominent creator of ergonomic workstations and tailor-made solutions.

news.headline: SpectraWAVE names Brad Davis as CCO and Bill Kelly as CFO, aiming to improve patient outcomes in coronary artery disease.
news.summary: SpectraWAVE, Inc., a medical imaging company dedicated to enhancing treatment for patients with coronary artery disease (CAD), revealed the inclusion of two experienced executives in its leadership roster. Brad Davis has been appointed as the Chief Commercial Officer (CCO), while Bill Kelly has taken on the role of Chief Financial Officer (CFO). This strategic move signifies a significant development for SpectraWAVE as they progress into a new phase of growth.

news.headline: Valspring Capital closes debut Fund I above target at $255 million for healthcare investments. Founded in 2022.
news.summary: Boston-based growth equity firm, Valspring Capital, revealed the successful closure of its first fund, the Valspring Capital Fund I, surpassing its target to reach $255 million. Established in 2022 by a group of professionals previously affiliated with Bain Capital Ventures, the team is backed by Bain Capital and will concentrate on healthcare investments. Their primary focus will be on growth-stage companies in the healthcare sector, particularly in information technology and technology-enabled services.

news.headline: U.S. median asking rent declined to $1,594 in Dec 2024, lowest since Mar 2022, down 0.3% YoY and 6.2% from Aug 2022 peak.
news.summary: In Seattle, according to a recent report by Redfin, the median U.S. asking rent decreased by 0.3% year over year in December to $1,594, marking the lowest level since March 2022. This figure was also down by 0.1% from the previous month and 6.2% from the peak in August 2022 when it was at $1,700. Additionally, the median asking rent per square foot experienced a 1.9% decline year over year to $1.78 in December and slid by 0.1% compared to the previous month. The report does not detail the specific reasons behind the drop in rental prices.

news.headline: DDN receives $300M investment from Blackstone at $5B valuation to fuel rapid growth in AI and data intelligence solutions.
news.summary: A company specializing in AI and data intelligence solutions, DDN, has recently secured a significant financial boost. Blackstone Tactical Opportunities has invested $300 million in DDN, valuing the company at $5 billion. This substantial investment will support DDN's ongoing expansion efforts to meet the increasing demands of its customers in AI and high-performance computing (HPC) sectors. Since its establishment in 1998, DDN has amassed a large customer base and is poised for further growth with this latest investment.

news.headline: Flavor masking agent market to reach USD 404.71M in 2030, grew at 7.45% CAGR from 2020-2023. Report covers various types.
news.summary: A report titled "Flavor Masking Agent Market (2024 Edition): Analysis By Type, Form, Application, Region, Country" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The global Flavor Masking Agent market saw a growth rate of 7.45% from 2020 to 2023. In 2023, the market reached a value of USD 249.26 Million and is projected to hit USD 404.71 Million by 2030. The report provides insights and forecasts on various types of masking agents such as Bitter, Sweet, Salt, Fat, and others.

news.headline: Manhattan launches Postgame Spotlight, a tool with real-time analytics dashboard to optimize fulfillment performance and limit inventory mistakes.
news.summary: In Atlanta, Manhattan Associates (NASDAQ: MANH) unveiled Postgame Spotlight, a new feature revealed through a live dashboard. This tool focuses on showcasing inventory allocation and placement strategies impacting order fulfillment efficiency. By offering real-time scenario analysis and practical suggestions, the solution aims to assist inventory planners in rectifying inventory deployment errors.

news.headline: Maxar wins $14M+ contract with Netherlands Ministry of Defence for geospatial platform access, assisting the Defence Geographic Agency.
news.summary: Maxar Intelligence, a trusted supplier of accurate geospatial insights, has revealed it secured a framework contract worth €13.6 million ($14.4 million) from the Netherlands Ministry of Defence (MoD). The contract spans four years and involves the provision of Maxar Geospatial Platform (MGP) Pro along with related geospatial products and solutions. Through this competitive agreement, Maxar will support the Defence Geographic Agency (DGA) of the MoD and its numerous users in enhancing the agency’s geospatial capabilities.
